one_line_summary: Well-documented and mostly complete TDD flow, but validation/event details and some implementation choices are rough.
strengths: Strong ADR with real alternatives and a clear Driver/Navigator artifact contract
Feature is wired through CLI, REPL slash command, kernel API, tests, README, and wiki
Good contract-focused tests, including retry on RED-pass and end-to-end stub flow
weaknesses: Phase-done events do not include test results for RED/GREEN/VALIDATE as documented, since test runs are stored only in history artifacts
Validation only checks the Navigator's verdict text; the flow does not itself verify the refactor actually landed cleanly
Kernel module is large and includes dead/unused pieces/imports, hurting cleanliness
